title: Recessed End Portal
description: Recessed End Portal is a clean and immersive texture pack that redesigns the End Portal frame with a deeper, recessed look, making it feel more realistic and visually satisfying.
body:
Recessed End Portal enhances the look of the End Portal by giving it a more detailed and sunken (recessed) design while staying true to the original Minecraft style.

Instead of the flat vanilla appearance, this pack adds depth and structure to the portal frame, making it feel more like a powerful and ancient gateway.

✨ Features:
- 🔳 Recessed (sunken) End Portal frame design
- 🎨 Vanilla-friendly colors and style
- 🧱 Improved depth and detail
- 👁️ Better visual experience when activating the portal
- ⚡ Lightweight and performance-friendly

![End Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af2f1152c53f0352d37b6c98b11aec35b99430a8.png)
